news.paragraph: Okta is experiencing mixed market signals as Argus Research recently raised its price target to $75.00, despite the stock recently sliding while the broader market rose. There are no immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the current headlines, though the company is operating within a heightened industry focus on AI-driven identity security threats.
